hooks.command: USERNAME=$(git config user.name | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | tr ' ' '-') && DOC="docs/contributors/${USERNAME}.md" && if ! git diff --cached --name-only | grep -q "$DOC"; then echo "BLOCKED: $DOC is not staged. Update it with current status (branch, task, blockers, date) and stage it before committing."; exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.description: Block commit unless contributor doc is staged
